channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Matttess, 28th May
item.description:
Mattress dumped in alley. Been here about 2-3 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sweep not taken place for several weeks, 28th May
item.description:
Leaf detritus in curbs down whole Avenue and central island. Leading to dusty conditions in wind and slippery when wet. Not appeared to have been cleaned for several weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustine's Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 28th May
item.description:
• Please give brief details of your complaint or compliment below: Littering • What action (if any) would you like us to take? Clean it & provide lager bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bush shelter glass, 28th May
item.description:
White graffiti and red paint on shelter glass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Pink graffiti on utility box, 28th May
item.description:
Pink writing on the electrical box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin overflowing, 28th May
item.description:
The bin at the bus stop is overflowing, the rubbish is blowing everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parkland walk bins full, 28th May
item.description:
The bins on the parkland walk need to be emptied more regularly. They are overflowing with dog poo bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Road, Crouch End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, blocking pavement, 28th May
item.description:
Location used repeatedly for fly tipping . Blocking pavement used by wheelchair users & children . Ongoing problem that should be investigated

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grand Union Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obscene graffiti and flyposting on Lamp Post, 28th May
item.description:
Please remove all graffiti and flyposted posters on this lamp pst on Peckham Hill Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Grazeley Close or Halcot Ave (between 174 - 176), 28th May
item.description:
There is a box of gas cannisters in the gutter and in the road on the junction of Grazeley Close and Halcot Avenue between 174 - 176 Halcot. They have been there for 2 days and need to be removed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grazeley Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags on bin - Peckham Hill St, 28th May
item.description:
Please remove these tags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing flytipping behind viva Dalston, 28th May
item.description:
This spot is prone to flytipping but there is a huge amount of rubbish there now and it smells from the heat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By Black gates on Malvern road, Carlton Vale end, 28th May
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rug flytipped on Fenham Road, 28th May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Large TV box flytipped on elcot avenue, 28th May
item.description:
Please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Tree or bush growth obstructing pavement. Outside property in on low road/ harefield road, 28th May
item.description:
Overhanging foliage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harefield Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches, 28th May
item.description:
Overhanging branches making it difficult to walk on the pavement. It's been like it for at least a month if not longer.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch damaged and down, 28th May
item.description:
Nearby resident and tree-lover!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mass flytipping on Commercial Way, 28th May
item.description:
Please remove all this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 720, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches, 28th May
item.description:
Hi there, It is a two way road and the trees branches have grown towards the street and are disrupting cars heading to the station, specially the van (which is our case). Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
